tagline: The category leader in insurance-driven contents restoration - a lean B2B owner-operator model backed by national carrier relationships and growing disaster demand.
description_short: 1-800-Packouts franchisees manage contents restoration for homes and businesses after fire, water, and storm events, with 99% of revenue coming from insurance claims routed through national carrier and adjuster networks. With 61 open units, a 2025 per-franchisee average revenue of $1.87M, protected territories, and backing from Five Star Franchising and Princeton Equity, this is a warehouse-based small-team operation built for experienced operators who build B2B relationships.
market_intelligence_insight: The property restoration services market is projected at $52.8B in 2025 growing to $55.8B in 2026 at a 5.7% CAGR, driven by increasing natural disaster frequency and a carrier shift toward restoration-first claim resolution to control record-high loss payouts.
item_19_headline: 2025 per-franchisee average revenue of $1,871,033 across 22 reporting franchisees averaging 2.24 units each
ongoing_support: online training system,regional conferences,field coaching,written and video tutorials,24/7 national call center,marketing coaching
